Playbit：面向个人的软件运行时

Playbit: A Personal-Scale Software Platform

2026-03-24

Playbit 是一个软件开发运行时，旨在让任何人都能创建供自己或亲友使用的应用程序。

这意味着什么？

对开发者：告别跨平台开发的繁琐——一次编写，可运行于 macOS、Windows、Linux、iOS、Android 和 Web。适合创意工具、编辑器、多人应用等不适合浏览器的软件。

对普通用户：未来可以通过链接分享轻量级应用，亲友无需复杂安装即可运行。

阅读完整文章：https://playbit.app

Playbit is a software runtime that enables anyone to create programs for themselves and the people in their life.

What This Means

For developers: Say goodbye to cross-platform headaches — write once, run on macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and Web. Perfect for creative tools, editors, multiplayer apps, and software that doesn't fit well in a browser.

For regular users: In the future, share lightweight apps via links that friends and family can run without complex installation.

Read the full article at https://playbit.app
